Default action.description: What type of element should CTRL/CMD+ENTER create. TEXT: A regular text element. STICKY: A sticky note with border color and background color (using the current setting of the canvas). STICKY: A sticky note with transparent border and background color.

Layout Options JSON.description: You can use layout options to configure the layout algorithm. A list of all options and further details of their exact effects is available in ELK's documentation.
